text: The subject is attending to a visual stimulus, likely a scene or object, with moderate visual and dorsal attention activation.
confidence: Medium confidence; would be higher if visual activation were stronger or DMN engaged.
raw:
The subject is attending to a visual stimulus, likely a scene or object, with moderate visual and dorsal attention activation.
Medium confidence; would be higher if visual activation were stronger or DMN engaged.
[Allen et al. 2022, Nature Neuroscience]
